data.title: Retail Dumps XRP In Panic As Setup Turns Explosive
data.description:
XRP sentiment has officially collapsed into extreme fear territory, and historically, that’s when some of the biggest rallies begin. According to social data shared by Santiment on January 22, XRP traders have turned deeply pessimistic following a sharp 19% drop from the January 5 highs. com
source: https://www.techgaged.com/retail-dumps-xrp-in-panic-as-setup-turns-explosive/

data.title: Ethereum Price Movements Could Trigger Significant Liquidations
data.description: Ethereum's price fluctuations could lead to substantial liquidation events on major centralized exchanges. According to ChainCatcher, data from Coinglass indicates that if Ethereum surpasses $3,107, the cumulative liquidation intensity for short positions on mainstream centralized exchanges will reach $1.539 billion. Conversely, if Ethereum falls below $2,817, the cumulative liquidation intensity for long positions will amount to $683 million.

data.title: Trump is suing JPMorgan Chase for closing his accounts for political reasons, seeking $5 billion in damages.
data.description: US President Donald Trump filed a lawsuit on Thursday against JPMorgan Chase and its CEO Jamie Dimon, seeking $5 billion in damages and accusing the financial institution of closing his accounts for political reasons. The lawsuit, filed Thursday, alleges commercial defamation and a breach of implied contracts. It also claims Dimon violated Florida's Fraudulent Business Practices Act. JPMorgan Chase responded that it would not close accounts for political or religious reasons. Previously, Trump had repeatedly named JPMorgan Chase in his campaign to stop banks from refusing financial services to customers based on ideological reasons. The lawsuit states that approximately seven weeks after Trump supporters stormed the US Capitol on January 6, 2021, JPMorgan Chase closed accounts belonging to Trump and his businesses. At that time, Trump had already left office, and his political influence was relatively low. According to the lawsuit, JPMorgan Chase notified Trump of the account closure "without any warning or inducement," causing him significant financial and reputational damage. (Jinshi)

data.title: Spot gold rose above $4,910 per ounce, hitting a new all-time high.
data.description: Spot gold rose above $4,910 per ounce, hitting a new all-time high, and is currently trading at $4,913 per ounce, up 1.73% on the day. (Jinshi)

data.title: Bitcoin & Ethereum ETFs Shed Over $1B – But Solana and XRP See Inflows
data.description:

source: https://cryptonews.com/news/bitcoin-ethereum-etfs-outflows-solana-xrp-inflows/

data.title: Nordic Pension Funds Reevaluate U.S. Investments Amid Rising Risks
data.description: Nordic pension funds are reassessing their investments in U.S. stocks, bonds, and dollar assets as risk premiums increase. According to NS3.AI, discussions about diversifying away from U.S. markets have gained momentum due to geopolitical and policy uncertainties. The situation has intensified after warnings from U.S. leadership about potential retaliatory measures against such diversification efforts.

data.title: Pi Network Pushes Instant Payments With New Developer Upgrade
data.description:
Pi Network released its first major technical update of 2026, placing a clear emphasis on making payments frictionless for builders across its ecosystem. The release focuses on simplifying how developers and creators integrate Pi payments, signaling a broader effort to accelerate real-world utility following the network’s Open Mainnet launch in 2025.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/pi-network-pushes-instant-payments-with-new-developer-upgrade/

data.title: USD.AI Approves $500 Million Loan for Sharon AI's Expansion
data.description: USD.AI, a blockchain-based lending protocol, has approved a $500 million loan for Sharon AI, an Australian AI infrastructure company. According to NS3.AI, the loan aims to support Sharon AI's expansion of GPU deployments, beginning with a $65 million GPU acquisition this quarter. USD.AI provides loans to AI startups backed by tokenized GPU assets, offering solutions to financing challenges faced in traditional systems.

source: https://www.techgaged.com/heres-why-balaji-says-crypto-is-americas-backup-plan/

data.title: South Korean Financial Groups Prepare for Won-Pegged Stablecoin Legalization
data.description: South Korea's major financial groups are joining forces to anticipate the legalization of won-pegged stablecoins, marking a shift from a ban imposed in 2019. According to NS3.AI, Hana Financial Group is spearheading a coalition that includes BNK, JB, and other entities to establish a special-purpose company for stablecoin issuance once the legislation is approved. The government is aiming to finalize the regulation by next month, although the central bank has expressed opposition to issuance by big tech companies and suggests imposing restrictions on bank-led consortia.

data.title: Bitcoin Mining Difficulty Expected to Decline for Fifth Time
data.description: Bitcoin's mining difficulty is anticipated to decrease by approximately 3.38%, marking the fifth consecutive drop. According to NS3.AI, this change indicates a reduction in mining hashrate as some miners shift focus towards high-powered computing and AI sectors. Despite the lower hashrate and potential security concerns, experts maintain that Bitcoin remains secure. They emphasize that miners' adaptable energy usage and global diversification contribute to the network's resilience.
